Container.Name: ai-usage-tracker
Container.Overview: Central aggregation server for Codex AI usage telemetry. Collectors forward compact usage events to this server, which stores them in SQLite and exposes token reports plus client-token administration.

Config.Name: Web UI / API Port
Config.Description: Host port for the aggregation server web UI, admin UI, reports, and ingestion API. The container listens on 8318/tcp.

Config.Name: Persistent Data
Config.Description: Stores the server SQLite database and WAL files.
